release_notes: CWS extension sideload + per-profile toggle. Install Chrome Web Store extensions by pasting either the 32-char ID or full CWS URL — the launcher pulls the CRX through Google's update endpoint, strips the CRX3 header, and unzips into userData/extensions/<id>/. Profile editor gets a new Extensions tab where each installed extension can be toggled per-profile (the profile's enabled set is passed to chrome via --load-extension). Probe also loads the same enabled set so the fingerprint surface during testing matches launch. Validated locally: 'MAX Video Downloader' v1.19.9 (3.6 MB) and 'HLS Downloader' v0.1.4 (49 KB) both install cleanly.
